recommendations.title: Amazon Women on the Moon
recommendations.overview: Centered on a television station which features a 1950s-style sci-fi movie interspersed with a series of wild commercials, wacky shorts and weird specials, this lampoon of contemporary life and pop culture skewers some of the silliest spectacles ever
recommendations.director: Robert K. Weiss, Joe Dante, Peter Horton, Carl Gottlieb, John Landis

recommendations.title: Trading Places
recommendations.overview: A snobbish investor and a wily street con-artist find their positions reversed as part of a bet by two callous millionaires.

recommendations.title: The Witches of Eastwick
recommendations.overview: Three single women in a picturesque village have their wishes granted, at a cost, when a mysterious and flamboyant man arrives in their lives.

recommendations.title: Mad Max: Fury Road
recommendations.overview: An apocalyptic story set in the furthest reaches of our planet, in a stark desert landscape where humanity is broken, and most everyone is crazed fighting for the necessities of life. Within this world exist two rebels on the run who just might be ab

recommendations.title: Piranha
recommendations.overview: When flesh-eating piranhas are accidentally released into a summer resort's rivers, the guests become their next meal.

recommendations.title: Small Soldiers
recommendations.genres: Comedy, Adventure, Fantasy, Science Fiction, Action
recommendations.overview: When missile technology is used to enhance toy action figures, the toys soon begin to take their battle programming too seriously.

recommendations.title: Burke & Hare
recommendations.overview: Two 19th-century opportunists become serial killers so that they can maintain their profitable business supplying cadavers to an anatomist.

recommendations.title: Ready Player One
recommendations.overview: When the creator of a popular video game system dies, a virtual contest is created to compete for his fortune.

recommendations.title: Schindler's List
recommendations.overview: The true story of how businessman Oskar Schindler saved over a thousand Jewish lives from the Nazis while they worked as slaves in his factory during World War II.

recommendations.title: Mad Max Beyond Thunderdome
recommendations.overview: Mad Max becomes a pawn in a decadent oasis of a technological society, and when exiled, becomes the deliverer of a colony of children.
